Author: Gamerhacker137
Name: GilMaster
Punchline: Find, gather, and craft the most profitable items on your server.
Description: Scans Universalis for high-demand crafted items matching your level, showing realistic prices, honest net profit, and seller competition. Drives GatherBuddy to gather the materials and Artisan to craft them (when installed). Also includes a DoH/DoL leveling advisor. Use /gilmaster to open.
